title: push: show image digest after push succeed
body:
Fixes #970 


After change :

```
➜  buildah git:(push-fix) ✗ sudo ./buildah push 71c dir:/home/zhouhao/test/buildah
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:cdb3f9544e4c61d45da1ea44f7d92386639a052c620d1550376f22f5b46981af
 55.73 MiB / 55.73 MiB [====================================================] 1s
Copying blob sha256:7f2cffb520ed710c0871cd07f4fd8041d67fb9b4a74e03d036db55c23a085840
 51.81 MiB / 51.81 MiB [====================================================] 0s
Copying blob sha256:64ef7c2d456f323178e92fd11fd6819c4b913ffedf3d27f8bf12702e6f953d36
 3.50 KiB / 3.50 KiB [======================================================] 0s
Copying config sha256:71c43202b8ac897ff4d048d3b37bdf4eb543ec5c03fd017c3e12c616c6792206
 5.88 KiB / 5.88 KiB [======================================================] 0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
Succefully pushed /home/zhouhao/test/buildah@d963acde7543161ad481fa33d4d03dcbd826826385c8155a5d6b3c89cb297fbb
```
Signed-off-by: Zhou Hao <zhouhao@cn.fujitsu.com>

comments.body: @q384566678 could you include some test output as part of your commit description please?  It's useful for the test folks later on down the line to verify the code is working as expected.  Thanks!
I was working on a similar patch, but got distracted.  @q384566678 Thanks for the PR.  Do we need something similar for podman push?

:pushpin: Commit f67d315 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan f67d3158abcd34c7527be9cb521ab990efbdb1e8 -->
@rhatdan Do we want something similar in Podman?
Yes.  @vbatts asked for this a while ago.
Was this merged or just closed?
